zh.lifeSummary: 當Baldwin de Malet於大約1287年出生在英國薩默塞特布利其沃特時，他的父親John de Malet23歲，母親Sibilla Saint Clare21歲。他於大約1309年與Avicia Raleigh在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1343年在他的家鄉享年57歲，埋葬在英國戴文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baldwin de Malet于大约1287年出生在英国薩默塞特布利其沃特时，他的父亲John de Malet23岁，母亲Sibilla Saint Clare21岁。他于大约1309年与Avicia Raleigh在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1343年在他的家乡享年57岁，埋葬在英国戴文。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Malet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname from a diminutive of Mal ‘bad’ or from a derivative of the related Old French word maleit ‘accursed’ (see Mallet 1). Compare Malette .
French: from the Old French personal name Malet, a pet form of Malo (compare Mallet 2).

variants.name: Mal
meanings: Slovenian: nickname for a physically small man, from mal ‘small, little’.

variants.name: Malette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Alphonse, Francois, Jacques, Rejean, Serge.
French: variant or feminine form of Malet and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this, reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Baldwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from bald ‘bold, brave’ + wine ‘friend’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In the Middle Ages it was a comparatively common name, which gave rise to a surname. It was borne by the Norman crusader Baldwin of Boulogne, who in 1100 was elected first king of Jerusalem, and by four further crusader kings of Jerusalem. It continued to be used by some families in England into the 17th century, but in modern times it normally represents a transferred use of the surname rather than a direct revival of the Norman given name.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Baldwin de Malet was born about 1287, in Bridgwater, Somerset, England, his father, John de Malet, was 23 and his mother, Sibilla Saint Clare, was 21. He married Avicia Raleigh about 1309, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1343, in his hometown, at the age of 57, and was buried in Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baldwin de Malet est né environ 1287, à Bridgwater, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John de Malet, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Sibilla Saint Clare, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Avicia Raleigh environ 1309, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1343, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baldwin de Malet um 1287 in Bridgwater, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Malet 23 und seine Mutter Sibilla Saint Clare 21. Er hat um 1309 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Avicia Raleigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1343 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baldwin de Malet è nato il circa 1287 nel Bridgwater, Somerset, England, il suo padre, John de Malet, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Sibilla Saint Clare, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Avicia Raleigh circa 1309, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1343, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Baldwin de Maletが約1287年にイギリスソメルセトブリドグワターで生まれた時，父John de Maletは23歳，母Sibilla Saint Clareは21歳であった。約1309年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでAvicia Raleighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1343年に故郷で57歳で死去し，イギリスデボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Baldwin de Malet(이)가 대략 1287년 영국 서머세트 브리지왓어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Malet(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibilla Saint Clare(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1309년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Avicia Raleigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1343년 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baldwin de Malet nasceu aproximadamente 1287, em Bridgwater, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Malet, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Sibilla Saint Clare, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Avicia Raleigh aproximadamente 1309, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1343, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baldwin de Malet родился около 1287 г. в местности бриджвэитир, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Malet было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Sibilla Saint Clare, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Avicia Raleigh около 1309 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1343 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности девон, Англия.
